payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active, current memory record for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because its superseded status indicates it has been replaced by newer information. The system preserves durable memory by retaining the supersession relationship but excludes superseded facts from recall to ensure only current facts are presented.
citations: Memory system filtering logic: superseded records excluded from recall
Entity resolution: mem_new designated as current state
Conflict classification: supersession relationship between mem_old and mem_new
payload.decision: mem_new is current; mem_old is superseded and filtered from recall results

entity_resolution.reason: mem_new represents the authoritative current state; mem_old is marked as superseded and filtered to prevent stale information in recall results

payload.intent: Explain recall filtering logic for Sam from Goldman: why mem_new was returned and mem_old was filtered as superseded

memory_cards.statement: mem_new contains current information about Sam from Goldman
mem_old is superseded by mem_new and excluded from active recall

repair_options: Verify supersession relationship is correctly marked in mem_old metadata
Confirm mem_new contains all relevant updates from mem_old
Audit timestamp and source of supersession event
